'''Plagen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], on the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]], with high plateaus covered in lakes and grasslands of lush yellow flora; its lowlands were dry plains.

At the junction of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]] the spaceport of [[TreeLeaf]] on the Celdas plateau is a modern city bustling with activity. The native short and furry Chikarri live in trees with spherical buildings connected by walkways.

==History==
When the planet was discovered in [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]], its port rights were sold to the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]]. The planet was the headquarters of [[Treeker Security Systems]], [[Boyd's Be-There-In-A-Minute Delivery Service]] and [[Chirrit & Chirrit Locks, Vaults, and Safes]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was the site of the [[First Battle of Plagen]]. Prior to the battle, a [[Unidentified T-series tactical droid (Plagen)|tactical droid]] killed [[Kerkoiden/Legends|Kerkoiden]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Piar Nagelsa/Legends|Piar Nagelsa]], due to issues most tactical droids had with serving under organic leaders, and then discarded the general's plans—leading the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist forces]] to victory.<ref name="Warfare" />

{{Planet-stub}}
